description: Cross-language protocol parity test vectors. Each SDK must produce identical output for these inputs.

sign_response.description: signResponse must produce a JACS document with this structure, given the input payload.

unwrap_signed_event.description: unwrapSignedEvent must return the inner payload from a signed document, or pass through non-JACS events.

cases.name: non_jacs_passthrough
cases.note: Events without JACS document structure pass through unchanged

cases.name: jacs_document_unwrap
cases.note: Without a known server key, unwraps payload without verification

canonical_json.description: canonicalizeJson must produce RFC 8785 output. These vectors supplement cross_lang_test.json.

cases.name: integer_vs_float
cases.note: JSON spec does not distinguish int/float; canonical form depends on language. SDKs should match their JACS binding output.

build_auth_header.description: buildAuthHeader must produce 'JACS {jacsId}:{timestamp}:{signature_base64}'. Vectors in cross_lang_test.json cover format; these cover edge cases.

cases.name: special_chars_in_id
cases.note: The jacsId is used as-is in the header (no URL encoding). Colon in jacsId is disambiguated by SplitN(3).
